所有程序包的分层结构

程序包分层结构:
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.annotation,
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.exception,
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.jdbc,
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.jdbc.tx

类分层结构

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.xiaoyu.micro.aop.AnnotationProxyBeanPostProcessor<A> (implements org.xiaoyu.micro.context.BeanPostProcessor)
      • org.xiaoyu.micro.jdbc.tx.TransactionalBeanPostProcessor
    • org.xiaoyu.micro.jdbc.BeanRowMapper<T> (implements org.xiaoyu.micro.jdbc.RowMapper<T>)
    • org.xiaoyu.micro.jdbc.tx.DataSourceTransactionManager (implements java.lang.reflect.InvocationHandler, org.xiaoyu.micro.jdbc.tx.PlatformTransactionManager)
    • org.xiaoyu.micro.jdbc.JdbcConfiguration
    • org.xiaoyu.micro.jdbc.JdbcTemplate
    • java.lang.Throwable (implements java.io.Serializable)
      • java.lang.Exception
        • java.lang.RuntimeException
          • org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.NestedRuntimeException
            • org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.DataAccessException
              • org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.TransactionException
    • org.xiaoyu.micro.jdbc.tx.TransactionalUtils
    • org.xiaoyu.micro.jdbc.tx.TransactionStatus

接口分层结构

  • org.xiaoyu.micro.jdbc.ConnectionCallback<T>
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.jdbc.tx.PlatformTransactionManager
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.jdbc.PreparedStatementCallback<T>
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.jdbc.PreparedStatementCreator
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.jdbc.ResultSetExtractor<T>
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.jdbc.RowMapper<T>

Annotation Interface Hierarchy

  • org.xiaoyu.micro.annotation.Transactional (implements java.lang.annotation.Annotation)
